---
title: "The Rev. Hugh Polson"
---

## The Rev. Hugh Polson

**Dates:** (b.1807)

### Description

husband of CMY’s first cousin Georgiana Crawley

### Biography

He is a clergyman without cure of souls in 1811.  Were the family in South Africa at the time of Charles Warren Adams’s marriage to their daughter Georgiana Alethe Polson?

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
